SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?hairstyle ?label(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?hairstyle wdt:P31 wd:Q327496 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?hairstyle wdt:P580 | wdt:P585 ?date
  }
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1900 && YEAR(?date) <= 1999)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?hairstyle rdfs:label ?label
    FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY ?year
```
